text: This autofix PR addresses 46 audit findings across 34 frontend files. The majority of changes are correct and improve real performance metrics (GPU-composited transforms, memoization, dynamic imports, lazy loading). However, the ProtectedRoute.tsx change introduces a critical RBAC bypass (substring match instead of array includes), and several audit-critical/important issues in HoursBarChart.tsx and Sidebar.tsx were left unaddressed. Multiple important issues also remain unfixed within changed files.

reasoning: Critical RBAC security bug in ProtectedRoute.tsx where String.prototype.includes is used instead of Array.prototype.includes, allowing ADMIN users to access ORGANIZATION_ADMIN routes via substring match. Fix must revert the authorization check logic.

message: staleTime: 30000 correctly paired with refetchInterval: 30000 — eliminates wasteful network requests when data is already fresh.
Extracted inline ThemeToggleButton to shared ThemeToggle component — eliminates redundant component definition and remount on every render.
Changed width animation to transform: scaleX() — GPU-composited, no layout reflow.
Extracted currentTier lookup from inside .map() to before the return — eliminates O(n²) repeatedly scanning levels per item.
Changed width animation to transform: scaleX() — same GPU-composited optimization.
Switched from width+transition-all (layout) to transform: scaleX+transition-transform (GPU-composited).
Same transform: scaleX pattern applied — consistent performance fix.
Namespace import * as Sentry replaced with named import { captureException } — enables tree-shaking.
Relative import ../../lib/api replaced with @/lib/api — conforms to project path alias convention.
users.find() extracted into useMemo — avoids O(n) linear search on every render.
Date formatting hoisted to useMemo — eliminates repeated Date construction per render per row.
Date formatting hoisted to useMemo — same optimization as OrganizationTable.
Hoisted IconComponent out of IIFE in JSX — reduces per-render function allocation.
Added loading="lazy" to Image component — defers off-screen badge images.
Fixed stale closure: onSuccess now reads variables.action from callback parameter instead of reviewMutation.variables.
Added loading="lazy" to avatar Image component.
Added sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, (max-width: 1024px) 50vw, 33vw" — browser can select correct srcset.
Dynamic import of RichTextEditor with ssr:false — removes ~80-100KB of tiptap JS from initial bundle.
Added duplicate certification prevention — prevents meaningless duplicates in the certification list.
Added index to React key (label+idx) — prevents key collisions if stat labels happen to duplicate.
Reduced blur-3xl to blur-xl — smaller GPU filter kernel.
Removed disableTransitionOnChange — enables smooth CSS transitions on theme swap.

CRITICAL RBAC BYPASS: rolesKey = allowedRoles.join(',') converts the array to a comma-separated string. rolesKey.includes(user.role) uses String.prototype.includes which does substring matching, not exact element matching. Example: allowedRoles=['ORGANIZATION_ADMIN'] produces rolesKey='ORGANIZATION_ADMIN' and 'ORGANIZATION_ADMIN'.includes('ADMIN') === true, granting ADMIN users access to ORGANIZATION_ADMIN routes. This is a direct security vulnerability introduced by this PR.
suggestion: Revert to the original array-based check: replace rolesKey.includes(user.role) with allowedRoles.includes(user.role). Remove the rolesKey variable entirely. The correct fix for the stale dependency issue is to use useMemo for allowedRoles in parent components, not to convert to a string with substring matching.

message: Changed motion-safe:transition-all to motion-safe:transition-opacity. The component uses translate-y-4/translate-y-0 for a slide-up animation, but with only transition-opacity, the translate-y snaps instantly. The intended 'fade-in-up' effect becomes a flat fade. Same issue in ImpactStats.tsx:19, LevelPathway.tsx:47, MissionVision.tsx:31.
suggestion: Use motion-safe:transition-all motion-safe:duration-700, or explicitly motion-safe:transition-[opacity,transform] motion-safe:duration-700 to retain both opacity and transform animation while scoping to animated properties.

message: Inline arrow functions onToggle, onHoursChange, onRatingChange, onApprove are created as new references on every render inside volunteers.map(). VolunteerRow is wrapped in memo with shallow prop comparison, but the unstable callback references cause every row to re-render on every parent render — completely defeating the memo optimization.
suggestion: Wrap each callback in useCallback with appropriate dependencies, or restructure with a stable callback map keyed by volunteerId.

message:
Description textarea applies errors.description? 'border-brand-error' : ... for border color, but no error message

is rendered below it. Zod schema has z.string().max(1000).optional() — if user enters >1000 characters, validation fails silently with no explanation.
suggestion:
Add error message rendering: {errors.description &&

{String(errors.description.message)}

}

message: useEffect depends on entire defaultValues prop object reference. If parent passes a new object (even with same values), the effect re-runs and re-slices eventDate — can cause cursor position in datetime input to jump while user is editing.
suggestion: Use defaultValues?.eventDate as the dependency instead, or initialize on mount only if intent is initialization.

message: Previous code had a try/catch guard around new Date(earnedAt).toLocaleDateString() showing 'Unknown date' on parse failure. Removed in this PR — unparseable dates will now display 'Invalid Date' to the user.
suggestion: Restore a lightweight guard or validate the date string before rendering toLocaleDateString.

message: rolesKey = allowedRoles.join(',') runs on every render. If allowedRoles is an inline prop like allowedRoles={['ADMIN']}, a new string is created and the useEffect re-fires every render. The original useMemo approach was unnecessary but this replacement doesn't solve the stable identity problem either.
suggestion: Remove rolesKey entirely, use allowedRoles.includes(user.role), and recommend parent components stabilize allowedRoles with useMemo.

message: CRITICAL audit finding left unaddressed: barrel import of multiple recharts components (Bar, BarChart, CartesianGrid, ResponsiveContainer, Tooltip, XAxis, YAxis) from top-level recharts prevents tree-shaking, adding ~500KB to bundle. The PR description listed this as a critical finding but no changes were made to this file.
suggestion: Use next/dynamic with ssr:false and import recharts from specific subpaths (e.g. recharts/es6/bar/Bar) to enable tree-shaking.

message: IMPORTANT audit finding left unaddressed: 19 individual Lucide icon imports bound into the ICONS object map. All icons are bundled even if only a subset is used by a given role's navItems. The PR description listed this as an important finding but no changes were made to this file.
suggestion: Use a dynamic icon registry (import * as Icons from 'lucide-react' and access via Icons[item.icon]) or code-split nav item definitions per role.

message: Search state used directly in query key ['admin-badge-pending', search] causes a new API request on every keystroke with no debouncing. This is a significant performance issue that was in the audit scope.
suggestion: Debounce search input (300ms) before it reaches the query key, or use enabled flag that only fires on blur/submit.

message: useMemo builds an object with only 7 of 15+ EventSeriesFormData fields and casts it as EventSeriesFormData. If calculatePreviewDates is later modified to use an omitted field, it would silently produce undefined at runtime with no type error.
suggestion: Extract the fields calculatePreviewDates actually needs into a narrower interface rather than casting the full type.

message: memo on ToolbarButton is largely ineffective — children prop receives JSX elements (e.g. <Bold className='w-4 h-4' />) which are new objects every render, breaking shallow comparison.
suggestion: Remove memo from ToolbarButton unless icon elements are also memoized at each call site.

message: useCallback on handleUpdate with [onChange] dependency only helps if parent memoizes onChange. If onChange is inline, the callback is recreated every render anyway.
suggestion: Consider using a ref-based pattern for the onChange callback if the parent cannot guarantee referential stability.

message: useMemo with [data] dependency is ineffective if the parent passes a new array reference each render (e.g. from useQuery). The memoization key never stabilizes.
suggestion: Consider whether the parent memoizes data or if this should use deep comparison — or accept that the main win here is null-safety.

message: will-change-transform added to non-animated decorative blur elements that never transform or animate. Unnecessary GPU layer promotion wastes memory.
suggestion: Remove will-change-transform from lines 25-26 — reserve it for elements that actually animate.

message: Potential division by zero if levels.length === 1: Math.round(idx / (levels.length - 1) * 100) would divide by 0.
suggestion: Add guard: return 0 when levels.length <= 1.

message: PDF MIME type check only checks application/pdf, missing variants like application/x-pdf and application/octet-stream.
suggestion: Broaden check: file.type === 'application/pdf' || file.name.endsWith('.pdf').

message: interests: 'interests' uses lowercase while every other label in the map uses Title Case. Inconsistent with ProfileCompletionBanner.tsx:36 which has interests: 'Interests'.
suggestion: Change to interests: 'Interests' for consistency.

message: Changed from key={cert} to key={idx} — array index as key is an anti-pattern for reorderable lists.
suggestion: Revert to key={cert} since dedup makes values unique.

message: Variable shadowing: idx declared as map parameter and again as const idx = certifications.indexOf(cert) inside onClick. The outer idx could be used directly.
suggestion: Use outer idx: certifications.filter((_, j) => j !== idx).

message: useCallback wraps toggle with [setTheme, resolvedTheme] deps. resolvedTheme changes on every toggle (the only event causing re-render), making the useCallback a no-op — the reference is recreated every render anyway.
suggestion: Either keep inline arrow or useCallback with [setTheme] only and read resolvedTheme from a ref.

message: as never type cast used throughout ChipSelect toggles (StepSkills, StepInterests, StepAvailability). The cast hides genuine type mismatches that should be fixed in the schema or ChipSelect interface.
suggestion: Type the toggle functions with proper generic param or accept readonly string[] in ChipSelect.

message: Error messages mix three patterns across the file: String(errors[id]?.message ?? ''), <message> as string, and errors[id].message.
suggestion: Standardize to a single pattern for consistency.

message: Namespace import import * as Sentry from '@sentry/nextjs' bundles the entire Sentry module, preventing tree-shaking. The audit issue mentioned this pattern (was fixed in ProofUploadForm but not here).
suggestion: Replace with import { captureException } from '@sentry/nextjs'.

message: HeroBanner checks if (isLoading) return null but parent already returns a loading skeleton before HeroBanner. The check is dead code.
suggestion: Remove redundant guard in HeroBanner.
